chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 831 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 18-11-2021 Syed Muhammad Ali Shah Rizvi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Pursuant to order dated 04-11-2021, Mazhar Ali Alvi, AIGP/Legal-II, Karachi and Irfan Ali Samo, SSP Sukkur are in attendance and they have also filed their reply to the explanation. We have gone through the same and have reluctantly accepted the same; however, both these officers are directed to be careful in future while filing comments before the Court. As to the merits of the case, the Petitioner seeks appointment as Police Constable under the Deceased Quota. However, it has already been decided by a Division Bench of this Court while passing judgment dated 03-09-2019 in the case of Imtiaz Hussain v. Province of Sindh & 03 others (C. P. No. D-271 of 2019) that any person, even a person under the Deceased Quota, cannot be appointed directly as Police Constable; therefore, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Respondents to treat the pending application of the Petitioner for appointment under the Deceased Quota for any ministerial job, if so entitled, and decide the same in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
